title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Mahindra Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Mahindra Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!
